label: macOS
note: A native desktop build is on the roadmap. Until it ships, the web app at app.hew3d.com runs fully in Safari/Chrome on macOS — same Rust kernel, same file format.

label: Windows
note: A native desktop build is on the roadmap. Until it ships, the web app at app.hew3d.com runs fully in Edge/Chrome on Windows — same Rust kernel, same file format.

label: Linux
note: A native desktop build is on the roadmap. Until it ships, the web app at app.hew3d.com runs fully in Chrome/Firefox on Linux — same Rust kernel, same file format.
